33.reason: [Only traverses left subtree if it exists, skips right subtree when left exists, violating in-order (left-to-right) leaf traversal requirement]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Only traverses left subtree if it exists, skips right subtree when left exists, violating in-order (left-to-right) leaf traversal requirement]

34.reason: [Only traverses right subtree if left is NULL and right exists; misses cases where both children exist 鈥 should always traverse both subtrees recursively]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Only traverses right subtree if left is NULL and right exists; misses cases where both children exist 鈥 should always traverse both subtrees recursively]

48.reason: [If the tree is empty (n=0), r is NULL, and passing NULL to shuchu causes dereference of NULL pointer in 'if(r->lc==NULL&&r->rc==NULL)', leading to runtime crash]
